channel.title: Hutch
channel.description: Updates for Hutch — multi-tool macOS utility from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.6.2
item.description:
• Fixed a major memory leak and hang. Background helpers (simulators, shortcuts, AppleScripts) were leaking processes and file handles, and the file-search query never released its results — Hutch could grow to several GB and stop responding. All fixed.
  • Single instance. Hutch no longer launches a second copy of itself; opening it again just brings the running one to the front.

item.title: Version 0.6.1
item.description: • Pounce: darker backdrop scrim so search text stays readable when the panel floats over very light pages. Theme translucency preserved.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
• App-wide themes — Recolor Hutch's panels and accents across every tool from Settings.
  • Frosted-glass Pounce — Raycast-style redesign with fresh themes for a cleaner launcher.
  • Draggable Pounce panel — Drag the window anywhere; it remembers the position.
  • Sleep & Shutdown timers — Schedule a sleep or shutdown after a set number of minutes.
  • Clearer What's New — Styled inline code, brighter text, roomier rows.

item.title: Version 0.4.18
item.description: • Scoped search: type file:, app:, clip:, win:, toggle:, > (actions), shortcut:, script:, sim: to filter Pounce to one source. A coloured chip appears left of the field; backspace or Esc clears it. Bare : shows a scope picker.

item.title: Version 0.4.16
item.description: • Fix random CPU spikes — Pounce no longer rebuilds its result list while closed; background filesystem I/O moved off the main thread

item.title: Version 0.4.16
item.description: • Fix sustained CPU growth after extended use — AX trust polling, drag-event task spam, Pounce rebuild debounce, and simulator polling all reduced. Stash CDN image downloads now include browser headers for better compatibility.

item.title: Version 0.4.15
item.description: • Cleaner update prompts — Release notes in the "update available" dialog now render as formatted text — bold feature names and bullet lists — instead of raw Markdown symbols.

item.title: Version 0.4.8
item.description: Fix intermittent crash on macOS 26 (Tahoe) during launcher and menu-bar interactions.

item.title: Version 0.4.7
item.description: Redesigned onboarding with per-tool deep-dives, cheat-sheet HUD, and hotkey conflict detection.

item.title: Version 0.3.1
item.description: Pounce v2 — recents, running-app dot, switch-vs-launch, modifier hints, clipboard history, custom commands, calculator, conversions (live FX), markdown preview, music control, recent downloads, window switcher (jumps to specific window), inline window-snap commands, web-search bangs (g/gh/w/npm/yt/mdn/so/amz/map), URL/email detection, iOS simulator picker with inline Boot/Shutdown/Delete buttons, Reset Audio + Xcode-junk cleanup actions, AI prompts via your own Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama keys (Keychain-stored), help cheatsheet ("?" inside Pounce). Plus a wake-fix for Window Manager hotkeys clobbering Pounce/Stash/Toggles.

item.title: Version 0.2.3
item.description: Toggles panel rows now light up in their semantic color (Dark Mode indigo, Keep Awake orange, Lock Screen red, etc.) instead of the global accent. Plus an in-app banner when a Sparkle update is found.

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description: Polish: Permissions sidebar attention dot is a single circle with a soft amber glow — properly centered. More from us: AIStats now links to its Mac App Store page.
